mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resume WHERE user_key = #{userKey} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM resume WHERE share_url = #{shareUrl} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM resume WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND user_key = #{userKey}
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR profile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM resume WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY view_count DESC, update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
